variants: Alexina Proctor is a prominent figure in neuropsychology known for her significant contributions to the field, which earned her the Ridgeway Star Medal. She holds a patent for the Heliotrope Signal Lens, demonstrating her innovative capabilities. As a member of the Ironroot Herbalists Network, Alexina combines her scientific expertise with a passion for herbal medicine. Her advancements can be attributed in part to the mentorship of Hasmik Keshishyan, who guided her academic pursuits. Through her work, Alexina Proctor continues to foster the intersection of psychology and holistic health.
